title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个开源 AI 代理项目，旨在与用户共同成长。它支持多种大型语言模型（如 OpenAI、Anthropic 的 Claude、ChatGPT 等），并整合了多个 AI 代理工具（如 Claude Code、Codex、Clawdbot、Moltbot）。项目拥有高星数（218,702），强调智能体在交互中的自适应和进化能力。
summary_en: NousResearch/hermes-agent is an open-source AI agent project designed to grow with users. It supports various large language models (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic's Claude, ChatGPT) and integrates multiple AI agent tools (e.g., Claude Code, Codex, Clawdbot, Moltbot). With high stars (218,702), it emphasizes adaptive and evolving capabilities in agent interactions.
